articles.title: NBC bumps Yankees-Red Sox to stay with golf as Scheffler forces playoff
articles.description:
An NBC Sports spokesman said the decision was made in consultation with the PGA Tour and Major League Baseball.

The post NBC bumps Yankees-Red Sox to stay with golf as Scheffler forces playoff appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NBC Sports prioritized golf over the Yankees-Red Sox game on June 28.
The decision was made in consultation with the PGA Tour and MLB.
Boston fans missed a key rivalry game due to playoff golf coverage.

articles.title: Heat wave and high humidity will blast much of the eastern US this week, meteorologists say
articles.description:
A long and dangerous heat wave will blast a large swath of the central and eastern United States this week, the National Weather Service said.

The post Heat wave and high humidity will blast much of the eastern US this week, meteorologists say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Meteorologists warn of a dangerous heat wave affecting Boston this week.
Temperatures may exceed 90°F with high humidity levels expected.
Residents should prepare for potential health risks and increased energy demand.

articles.title: Motor coach bus catches on fire on I-95 in N.H.
articles.description:
All occupants exited the bus safely, fire officials said.

The post Motor coach bus catches on fire on I-95 in N.H. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Motor coach bus caught fire on I-95 in New Hampshire on June 28.
All occupants exited the bus safely, according to fire officials.
Boston residents traveling to New Hampshire should be aware of potential delays.

articles.title: At least 117 dead dogs found in ‘horrific scene’ at California ‘no-kill’ shelter
articles.description:
The sheriff’s office said it started investigating the shelter after receiving “credible information” in April “regarding allegations of felony animal abuse, animal cruelty, fraud, and conspiracy.”

The post At least 117 dead dogs found in ‘horrific scene’ at California ‘no-kill’ shelter appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Sheriff's investigation revealed 117 dead dogs at a California no-kill shelter.
Investigation began in April 2023 due to allegations of animal abuse and fraud.
Boston residents may face increased scrutiny of local shelters and animal welfare practices.

articles.title: NASA races to save Swift telescope from falling back to Earth with daring rescue mission
articles.description:
“This is the first American space robot to go up and do anything like this."

The post NASA races to save Swift telescope from falling back to Earth with daring rescue mission appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: NASA initiates a rescue mission for the Swift telescope to prevent its re-entry into Earth's atmosphere.
The Swift telescope is the first American space robot designed for such a mission.
Boston scientists are closely monitoring the mission's success, impacting local space research initiatives.

articles.title: Cambridge man who threw cat out of window sentenced for animal cruelty
articles.description:
The man admitted to stepping on the cat, grabbing it by the tail and neck, and slamming it on the ground head-first.

The post Cambridge man who threw cat out of window sentenced for animal cruelty appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge man sentenced for animal cruelty after throwing cat from window.
The man admitted to violently handling the cat on June 28, 2026.
Local animal advocates emphasize the need for stricter animal protection laws.

articles.title: Man killed on Boston highway after head-on crash with wrong-way driver
articles.description:
State police say the 81-year-old driver had caused a crash involving a family of four before colliding head-on with the victim’s vehicle.

The post Man killed on Boston highway after head-on crash with wrong-way driver appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: An 81-year-old wrong-way driver caused a head-on crash on a Boston highway.
The crash involved a family of four before colliding with the victim's vehicle.
Boston residents face increased concerns over highway safety following this tragic incident.
